mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_checklist (user_id, item_key, star_rating) VALUES (#{userId}, #{itemKey}, #{starRating}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE star_rating = #{starRating}, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_checklist WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND item_key = #{itemKey}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO user_checklist (user_id, item_key, star_rating) VALUES
(#{userId}, #{item.itemKey}, #{item.starRating})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE star_rating = VALUES(star_rating), updated_at = NOW()
